title: Elytra+
description: Adds various quality of life improvements around the Elytra. Including a dedicated inventory slot
body:
# ElytraPlus

**A dedicated elytra slot — wear your wings *and* your chestplate — plus a full suite of flight tools, all in a clean in-game menu.**

Slot an elytra in its own equipment slot (next to your armor) and glide while wearing a chestplate, then customize everything from the ElytraPlus screen. **Open your inventory and click the ⚙ gear next to the elytra slot — or run `/elytraplus` — to explore all of it.** Every feature below is toggleable in-game.

---

## The dedicated slot
- A new equipment slot just for your elytra (or any glider) — fly while wearing a chestplate
- Works in the **creative** inventory too
- **Auto-equip** a picked-up elytra into the slot
- **Render your wings** from the slot on your back
- **Slot-only gliding** option (ignore a chest-worn elytra)
- **Quick-swap** keybind to move an elytra in/out of the slot
- **Wear %** display — on the slot and/or a draggable on-screen indicator, colour-coded green→red

## Flight HUD & info
- In-flight **HUD**: pitch (with optimal-angle colouring), speed, altitude, heading, and estimated flight time — fully draggable
- **Flight-time estimate** in elytra tooltips
- **Low-durability alert** (HUD flash + optional chime) before your wings break

## Particle trails (with a live editor)
- Stream a **trail** behind any gliding player — **Particles**, a solid swept **Ribbon**, or **Both**
- Presets (End Rod, Flame, Soul Flame, Cloud, Snowflake, Heart, **Rainbow**) or a **custom colour** picker; adjustable length, density, and thickness
- A two-pane editor with a **live preview** of your character: place **emitters** by dragging them onto body parts or wing tips — trails ride your **actual animated wings** in flight

## Flight assists
- **Easy takeoff** — launch into a glide from the ground (no cliff needed)
- **Pitch-lock** (hold) and **auto-level** autopilot
- **Boost** keybind (fire a rocket) and **auto-firework** when you slow down
- **Safe flight** — no more lethal wall-smack/kinetic damage
- **Unbreakable elytra** option

## Fly-to autopilot & locations
- Save **flight locations**; each shows its estimated **rockets** needed
- Click a location for a detail view (name it, see distance / rockets / elytra durability) and **Go**
- **Auto-takeoff**, rocket-powered cruise to a configurable **cruise height** and **min speed**, then a gentle no-rocket **float-down** landing
- **Flight estimator** tool — enter a distance to get the optimal height, angle, speed, rockets, and elytra usage

## Server / operator controls
- A built-in **Server Admin** menu (operators only) to allow/disable each cheaty function **server-wide** — easy takeoff, fly-to, item-less boost, quick-swap, safe flight, unbreakable elytra
- All assists are opt-in; the cheaty ones are server-enforceable

## Command & keybinds
- **`/elytraplus`** opens the settings menu (handy if you can't reach the inventory button)
- Keybinds are **unbound by default** (set them in Options → Controls → Gameplay): **Takeoff**, **Firework boost**, **Quick-swap elytra**, **Pitch lock** (hold), **Toggle auto-level**

---

## Client vs. server
- **Pure client-side** (work on any server): flight HUD, tooltips, particle trails, pitch-lock/auto-level, alerts, all the menus.
- **Gameplay features** (the slot itself, takeoff, boost, quick-swap, safe-flight, never-breaks, fly-to): need ElytraPlus **installed on the server** too (or single-player). On a vanilla server, only the client cosmetics work.

## Requirements
- **Minecraft 26.1.2** · **Fabric / Forge / NeoForge**
- **[CodxLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/codxlib)** (required, like Fabric API) — powers the UI, networking, config, and update checks
- **Fabric API** on Fabric

---

## Short description
A dedicated elytra slot so you can glide while wearing a chestplate — plus a flight HUD, customizable trails with a live emitter editor, easy takeoff, fly-to autopilot with a rocket estimator, flight assists, and operator controls. Explore it all from the in-game menu. Fabric / Forge / NeoForge.
